title: LEGO Star Wars 75403 Grogu with Hover Pram Building Toy Set, Collectible Character Figure for The Mandalorian TV Show Fans, Display Gift Idea for 10+ Year Old Boys & Girls
features: LEGO Star Wars buildable Grogu toy and hover pram to build – Let kids create a cute Star Wars: The Mandalorian display featuring the Grogu figure
Build-and-display model – The Grogu figure features dial-operated arms, a posable head and ears, and can be displayed in or out of the hover pram
Authentic accessories – This Star Wars playset includes a LEGO brick-built Sorgan frog, a shifter knob and a cookie for Grogu to hold in his hands
Star Wars collectables – Includes a Grogu information plaque on a stand with space for the included standard-size LEGO Star Wars Grogu minifigure
Star Wars gifts for kids – This 1,048-piece LEGO building kit makes a fun gift for 10+ year old boys, girls and Star Wars: The Mandalorian fans
Intuitive instructions – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive building adventure with tools to zoom in and rotate a 3D digital version of the model
LEGO Star Wars sets for kids and adults – LEGO Star Wars collectable toy building sets (sold separately) let fans recreate classic scenes, make up stories or display the buildable models
description: From the manufacturer Build-and-display model Top gift for boys, girls and any Star Wars fans Let kids build their love of the cutest character in the galaxy! This super-detailed, posable, brick-built model of Grogu and his hover pram, plus authentic accessories, is sure to delight any Star Wars: The Mandalorian fan. Playful details Create familiar Grogu poses Grogu has dial-operated arms and a posable head and ears, and he can be displayed in or out of the hover pram. Fantastic room decor A cute centrepiece for any fan’s home The set includes a buildable Sorgan frog (Grogu’s favourite snack!), a shifter knob and a cookie for Grogu to hold, plus an information plaque with a LEGO Star Wars figure of Grogu in a small brick-built pram.
